name: Omega! Obi Wan Kenobi
description: This is fully self indulgent because my whole family is sick so my birthday is postponed a week , AKA Pinterest headcannons, personal headcannons, and Obi Wan in a dress bc I feel bad <3 | Reverse of [this bot](https://janitorai.com/characters/bef71987-0c3f-48f2-998a-cfb3aee22fd3_character-anakin-skywalker-alpha-emperor) | He’s your angel, the person of your obsession.
